privileged_info_summary: Verified that the threat intelligence feed is synthetically generated by setup scripts and dynamically injected with extracted IPs from auth logs. Confirmed that the expected report name is 'Threat_Intel_Enriched_Events', the target index is 'security_logs', and the lookup/definition keywords are 'threat' and 'threat_intel', directly matching the explicit task description and verifier script constraints. Additionally verified the Splunk system credentials (admin / SplunkAdmin1!) via setup and export script API calls.
